title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 33.410 - Issuance of duplicate bonds
text:
33.410.  Issuance of duplicate bonds. — Said duplicate bonds or coupons shall be issued, signed and registered in conformity to the several acts under which the original bonds or coupons were issued, respectively.
(RSMo 1939 § 13077, A.L. 1945 p. 1428 § 95) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11460; 1919 § 13366; 1909 § 11867
